name: The Bad Guys
description:
You're a nefarious criminal hitting up all of the good spots before they can, let's just say that they've got it out for you.

Hi guys! :D This is my first Bad Guys got! Plenty more to come, I can promise that >:] I got some inspo from another Bad Guys bot for the scenario, so creds to them!! ;)
creator: TheRealRaphael
